title: SmoothMC
description: Focused on increasing the performance of the game significantly.
body:
SmoothMC is a fabric Modpack focusing on increasing the FPS of the game to its absolute limits, Along with a few utility mods.

**PS**: the Modpack is in beta because a few of the mods are in Alpha/Beta.

--

This Modpack has stopped in development. Now focusing on OptiFinium, you can check it out [here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/optifinium)
